feeds.title: Feeds
feeds.none: No feeds yet — add one from the reader.
feeds.scrapedHint: Generated from the page's article list — the site offers no feed
feeds.statusErroring: This feed last failed to fetch. A refresh will retry it.
feeds.statusGone: This feed appears gone. A refresh will retry it.

tags.title: Tags
tags.none: No tags yet — create one to group your feeds.

opml.title: Import & export
opml.exportLead: Download all your feeds as an OPML file.
opml.importLead: Import an OPML file, or paste its contents.
opml.result: Imported {{imported}}, already subscribed {{already}}, invalid {{invalid}}, skipped over limit {{skipped}}. New feeds fill in on the next refresh.

addFeed.title: Add a feed
addFeed.foundPick: We found these feeds — pick one:
addFeed.scrapedHint: No feed found — generated from the page's article list.
addFeed.noneFound: No feeds found at that address.
addFeed.failBlocked: This site blocks automated access — it can't be subscribed.
addFeed.failUnreachable: The site couldn't be reached — check the address or try again later.
addFeed.failNotScrapable: This page offers no feed and no article list could be detected — it can't be subscribed.

editFeed.title: Edit feed
editFeed.noTags: No tags yet — create one from Settings › Tags.

manage.unsubscribeMessage: Remove “{{title}}” and its entries from your feeds?
manage.deleteTagMessage: Delete “{{name}}”? It will be removed from every feed that uses it.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to your reader.
login.invalidInput: Please enter a valid email and password.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register, then confirm your email.
register.done: Check your email for a confirmation link. After you confirm, an administrator reviews your account before you can sign in.

reset.requestSubtitle: We’ll email you a reset link.
reset.requestDone: If that address has an account, a reset link is on its way. The link is valid for 24 hours.
reset.linkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.failed: Could not reset the password. Request a new link.

verify.title: Confirm email
verify.ok: Your email is confirmed. An administrator will review your account before you can sign in.
verify.invalid: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.

oauth.title: Signing you in
oauth.error: Sign-in did not complete. Please try again.

reader.readerFallback: Couldn't load the full article — showing the feed's summary.
